scripts.dev: npm run build -w packages/shared && concurrently -n server,client -c cyan,green "npm run dev -w server" "npm run dev -w client"
scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/shared && npm run build -w server && npm run build -w client && npm run copy-client
scripts.copy-client: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const src='client/dist';const dst='server/dist/public';fs.rmSync(dst,{recursive:true,force:true});fs.cpSync(src,dst,{recursive:true});console.log('Client copied to server/dist/public')"
scripts.type-check: npm run build -w packages/shared && tsc --noEmit -p server/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p client/tsconfig.json
